name: Bench Pull-Up
shortDescription: A pull-up variation using a bench for foot support to reduce load and assist the movement.
instructions: Set a bench or box under a pull-up bar and place your feet on it for support. Grip the bar overhead and engage your lats to pull your chest up, using your legs to assist as needed, then lower yourself under control.
steps: Place a bench under a pull-up bar.
Grip the bar with hands wider than shoulder-width.
Position feet on the bench for support.
Pull your chest towards the bar, using feet as needed.
Lower yourself slowly to starting position.
formCues: Don't let legs push too much
breathing: Exhale as you pull up, inhale as you lower down.
